task_completion.description: Open the Resources view in ProjectLibre.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre window displays the 'Resources' spreadsheet view, showing a list of personnel names.

task_completion.description: Assign 'Engineering' to Alice Johnson, Bob Smith, and Carol Williams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Resources spreadsheet, the 'Group' column for Alice Johnson, Bob Smith, and Carol Williams contains the text 'Engineering'.

task_completion.description: Assign 'QA' to Emma Davis and 'PMO' to Frank Miller.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Resources spreadsheet, the 'Group' column for Emma Davis contains 'QA' and for Frank Miller contains 'PMO'.

task_completion.description: Leave David Brown's Group field unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Resources spreadsheet, the 'Group' column for David Brown is empty or unchanged.

task_completion.description: Select XML format for saving the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or export dialog is visible with the file type or format set to XML.

task_completion.description: Save the file to the expected output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the file name as 'categorized_resources.xml' and the directory as '/home/ga/Projects/', or a terminal shows the file successfully saved at this path.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ProjectLibre application interface rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying the project file.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the XML file directly in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening the XML file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually insert the group names.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application to assign groups.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into the 'Group' fields in the ProjectLibre Resources view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target assignments: Alice Johnson (Engineering), Bob Smith (Engineering), Carol Williams (Engineering), Emma Davis (QA), Frank Miller (PMO). Untouched sample: David Brown. Expected output path: /home/ga/Projects/categorized_resources.xml.
